    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'B':
            rows = [r for r, c in n['boundary']]
            center_row = sum(rows) / len(rows)
            if 50 <= center_row <= 58:
                cols = [c for r, c in n['boundary']]
                center_col = sum(cols) / len(n['boundary'])
                if 43 <= center_col <= 47:
                    pos4_cycle.append(n['hash'])
                    break

all_cycles[4] = pos4_cycle
print(f"Pos 4 cycle: {pos4_cycle}")
print(f"Pos 4 ∩ top: {set(pos4_cycle).intersection(top_hashes)}")

# Summary
print(f"\nAll position cycles and top panel overlaps:")
for pos, cycle in all_cycles.items():
    overlap = set(cycle).intersection(top_hashes)
    print(f"  Pos {pos}: {len(overlap)} matches: {overlap}")
